meta.title: Stoa Campaigns Capability Loop
meta.notes: Veo exports 16:9 — displayed in 4:3 card via object-cover

scene.description: Blank glass campaign frames float and rotate gently in depth. Coral ribbon light pulses along a connecting path.

render_prompt: 8 second seamless loop, 16:9. Floating blank glass ad frames drift in 3D with parallax. Coral light ribbon pulses through the scene. True object motion, NOT image pan. No people. Loopable.
